Key Takeaways - Career Block: Michael Parra, a 20-year technician, is capped at ~$116k/yr due to a lack of formal degrees and software skills; his prior base salary was $147k. - Proposed Solution: A 6-month, $20k 'Gold Data Engineering + AI' program to close his skill gap (SQL, Python, AWS) and leverage his experience for a higher-paying role. - Financial Hurdle: Parra's cash flow is tight after a recent move and home purchase. He applied for a Climb loan to finance the program, with an estimated ~$200-300/mo payment. - Timeline: A 6-month transition aligns perfectly with Parra's need to stay at his current job until late October to avoid repaying a relocation package. Topics Michael Parra's Career Situation - Background: 20 years in tech, specializing in EV battery systems since 2006. - Career Block: Reached a compensation ceiling at ~$116k/yr ($58/hr) as a Principal Technician. - Prior Salary: $147k/yr base, plus bonuses. - Root Cause: Lack of a bachelor's degree and formal software skills. - Motivation: Seeks a new challenge and higher earning potential, citing boredom with repetitive technician work. - Current Status: Recently moved to the Bay Area for a new role. Must remain employed until late October to avoid repaying a relocation package. Skill Gap & Transition Plan - Skill Assessment (0-10 Scale): - SQL: 0 - Python: 1-2 - AWS: 0 - Data Modeling: 0 - Data Visualization: 0 - Proposed Program: 'Gold Data Engineering + AI' Pathway. - Cost: $20,000 (promotional price, down from $30k). - Duration: ~6 months total. - Upskilling: ~3.5 months (15-25 hrs/wk). - Job Search: ~2.5 months. - Curriculum: - Personalized Plan: A senior Data Engineer acts as a Success Manager to create a custom learning path. - Learning Format: Videos + interactive coding exercises (SQL, Python, AWS). - Projects: Real-world projects designed by the CTO (ex-Disney) to build a portfolio. - AI Integration: Teaches practical AI skills for efficiency and solution-building, a rare and valuable market differentiator (<1% of resumes). - Job Search Support: - Application Management: A dedicated recruiter handles all applications (~500/mo). - Resume Optimization: Transforms the resume to pass AI scanners and highlight new projects. - Interview Prep: Unlimited mock interviews using a constantly updated pool of real questions. - Guarantee: 20 interviews within 6 months or a full refund. - Negotiation: Support to secure a salary increase, targeting a return to his prior $147k+ base. - Post-Job Support: 12 months of ongoing access to coaches for in-role assistance. Financials & Financing - Financial Constraint: Tight cash flow after a recent move, home purchase, and paying off credit card debt. - Savings: ~$15,000, currently being used for moving expenses. - Credit: Excellent (805 score), which enables favorable financing. - Financing Options Discussed: - Climb (Recommended): A student loan partner offering low monthly payments (est. ~$300/mo for 84 months). - 0% Interest Credit Card: A 24-month card would have a very low minimum payment (est. ~$200/mo). - Clarity Pay: Ruled out due to higher monthly payments (est. $500-600/mo). - Action: Parra applied for a Climb loan during the meeting. The application is pending review. Next Steps - Michael Parra: Await the Climb loan decision. Use the monthly payment offer to determine financial feasibility. - Joshua Astle: Follow up with Parra after the Climb decision is received. HT (Highly Technical) + Manager. Closer to Omer's profile but ON the technical side WITH real engineering credentials AND active leadership. ESTIMATED REAL COMP: $180–250K (SRE Manager, 10yr tenure). The $72K pre-approval is convenience, not rescue. ═══════════════════════════════════════════ ⚠️ THE $42K MYSTERY — DON'T BRING UP UNLESS SHE DOES Leadfi Feb report said $42K income but she was already SRE Manager at TR. Discussed transition from 15-year SAP Finance consulting career to data science and engineering with focus on hands-on learning. * Confirmed salary target of $150,000+, though Chris noted director-level roles typically pay $300,000-$400,000. * Established urgency due to SAP industry automation concerns and desire to start immediately with 4-8 week timeline. * Noted Imran already completed two previous calls two to three months ago but Chris indicated skill assessment process needs repetition. * Call was interrupted before finalizing next steps despite Imran's readiness to proceed without additional assessments. **Career Transition Goals** * Imran has 15 years of IT consulting experience in SAP Finance and wants to transition to data science and engineering. * He is willing to start with data analytics as an intermediate step rather than waiting for the full data science engineering role. * Imran seeks hands-on learning and real-time work experience rather than purely academic training. * He emphasized the importance of working with experienced instructors and quality materials to resolve his questions. **Salary and Role Expectations** * Imran currently earns between $110-$150 per hour as a contractor, sometimes reaching $250+ when managing multiple projects. * He is targeting a salary of $150,000+ for his next position, though Chris noted this is conservative for his experience level. * Imran indicated willingness to accept a manager or director position, though his primary focus is on learning and skill development rather than salary. * Chris suggested director-level roles typically command $300,000-$400,000 based on 15 years of experience. **Motivation and Timeline** * Imran is motivated by automation and job loss trends in the SAP industry, prompting an urgent need to upskill. * He wants to start as soon as possible and is willing to allocate more than two to three hours daily to learning. * Imran prefers a six-month project-based engagement initially before moving to the next role. * He stated that waiting is not an option given industry changes and wants results within 4-8 weeks. **Prior Engagement and Next Steps** * Imran mentioned he had already completed two Zoom calls with Data Education Holdings approximately two to three months ago. * He expressed readiness to begin immediately rather than repeating the skill assessment process. * Chris indicated that Imran would need to go through the skill assessment process again with Final Five Professional despite previous calls. * The call was interrupted and inconclusive regarding the final next steps forward. **Relevant Experience and Background** * Imran has worked with data teams and data science teams during SAP migrations from legacy systems to modern SAP. * He has enterprise experience with major clients including Apple, Boeing, Honda, and Medtronic. * His familiarity with enterprise-level problems in SAP environments translates well to data science challenges, though in different domains. * He expressed confidence in his ability to learn data science given his extensive background in complex IT Imran prefers a six-month project-based engagement initially before moving to the next role. He stated that waiting is not an option given industry changes and wants results within 4-8 weeks. Prior Engagement and Next Steps Imran mentioned he had already completed two Zoom calls with Data Education Holdings approximately two to three months ago. He expressed readiness to begin immediately rather than repeating the skill assessment process. Discussed flexible payment options including $500 down with $2,000 discount, three-payment splits, or monthly loan payments of $600-$700 through Climb financing. Assessed Imran's technical skills at 5-7 out of 10 across SQL, data modeling, system design, and identified focus areas as management and communication training. Projected one month of technical training plus two months of job placement for approximately three-month total timeline. Scheduled follow-up call for Tuesday at 5pm CST and agreed to provide contact information for recent program graduates. Prior Relationship and Current Interest Imran and Jordon had previously spoken three months ago about Data Education Holdings' services. Imran expressed strong interest in moving forward with the full service package including technical upskilling and job placement. Imran emphasized wanting actual results rather than training alone, stating they have discussed the program enough and now need concrete action. Service Package and Pricing Discussion Jordon quoted the gold package price at $25,000 for technical upskilling, 20 interview guarantee, mock interviews, resume fixing, and job applications. Imran recalled a previous quote of $7,000 and questioned the significant price increase to $25,000. Jordon explained price increases reflect added coaches, improved success rates, and higher operational costs since the last conversation. Jordon emphasized the company has a 90% success rate for candidates who reach the interview stage. Jordon highlighted the company's specialization in the data industry only, which allows for expertise and targeted preparation. Financial Payment Options and Terms Imran requested a payment plan rather than paying the full amount upfront, wanting to use sign-on bonuses and salary to pay off the service. Jordon explained the company cannot operate on deferred payments as they have 160 employees to pay and need funds upfront. Jordon offered three payment options: splitting $25,000 into three payments, securing a loan through Climb, or a combination of upfront cash plus financing. The loan option through Climb would result in approximately $600-$700 monthly payments. Imran stated he could afford around $300-$400 monthly payments. Jordon proposed a trial period: $500 down payment would reduce the price by $2,000 to approximately $23,000, allowing Imran to experience the program for two to three days. Credit Score and Financial Capacity Assessment Imran disclosed a credit score around 600, which Jordon noted requires some upfront cash for loan approval. Jordon indicated the company needs between $1,000-$7,000 upfront depending on financing needs. Imran indicated flexibility on payment amounts and stated the specific numbers weren't a major concern for moving forward. Imran's Background and Qualifications Imran has 15 years of IT experience as an IT consultant and SAP finance specialist, currently earning over $250,000 annually. Imran holds a bachelor's degree in finance and accounting and is a CPA from New York. Imran has worked with multiple clients' data teams and solved their technical problems. Imran is interested in transitioning to a technical program manager position in the data industry. Skills Assessment and Training Timeline Imran self-ranked his technical skills: SQL at 6-7 out of 10, data modeling at 5-6, AWS at 4-5, system design at 6-7, and Python higher but understated. Jordon indicated Imran's existing skill set may already meet many requirements and training would focus on management and communication skills. Imran committed to dedicating 8-10 hours daily to studying. Jordon estimated approximately one month for technical training plus two months to secure a job, totaling a three-month window. Jordon emphasized he would not provide misleading timelines without a complete skills assessment and onboarding plan. Program Value and Services Included The gold package includes access to 20 senior-level engineers, 30 live lectures per week, unlimited one-on-one mock interviews, resume optimization, and job applications up to 100 per week. Jordon emphasized the company's 20 interview guarantee and stated that with Imran's likability and honesty, he would likely secure a job within those 20 interviews. Jordon compared the service value to buying a quality car that reliably reaches its destination versus a cheaper alternative that may not. The company has successfully placed 3,000 people into jobs according to Jordon's claims. References and Social Proof Imran requested contact information for recent graduates who completed the program within two to three months. Jordon explained only limited contacts have agreed to share their information (approximately five people) and offered to send available references. Jordon noted that comparing to other graduates is difficult since the program customizes training for each individual. Jordon recommended Imran review coach profiles and 400 Trustpilot reviews as more relevant data points than individual output stories. Next Steps and Follow-up Jordon offered a test-drive period for $500 down payment to allow Imran to try the program for two to three days before committing fully. The pair scheduled a follow-up call for Tuesday at 5pm CST to continue the conversation. Jordon agreed to send contact information for recent program graduates and additional program details.
